OUR
COFFEE

At Coffee Matters, we take pride in our expertly crafted brews. Our signature blend features double-origin beans from Brazil and Peru, delivering a rich, complex flavor profile.

What truly sets us apart is our exclusive Greek-style Freddo Espresso and Freddo Cappuccino. These refreshing iced coffee creations offer a perfect balance of bold espresso and velvety smoothness.

SWEETS & PIES& BRUNCH

Tired of the same old brunch? Come discover our new Mediterranean-inspired menu. We use authentic ingredients to bring you true flavors from across the sea.

We've given classic brunch foods a fresh Greek twist. Our menu blends time-honored recipes with creative new ideas to create something truly special.

See Menu

HOST YOUREVENTS

Make Coffee Matters the canvas for your next special event. Our versatile venue transforms to suit your vision, whether you're planning an intimate gathering or a lively celebration.

ABOUTUS

A Place to Love

What our guests say

Google Reviews
4.7
(570)

"The Freddo Espresso is unlike anything I've had in London. The Greek touch makes it special."

Sofia M.

Google

"A hidden gem on Brick Lane. Beautiful space, excellent coffee, and the pastries are homemade and delicious."

James R.

Google

"Visited on a rainy afternoon and instantly felt at home. The staff are incredibly warm and the brunch is outstanding."

Maria L.

TripAdvisor

"Authentic Greek flavours done right. The spanakopita and freddo combo has become my weekly ritual."

Niko P.

Google

"Cosy spot with genuinely friendly staff. The coffee is excellent and the homemade cakes sell out fast."

Hannah W.

TripAdvisor

"Great little café just off the main drag. Relaxed atmosphere, strong coffee, and generous brunch portions."

Daniel K.

Google

MATTERS
